chapter_context.summary: Recounts Jeremiah cast into a miry dungeon, rescued by Ebed-melech the Ethiopian, and his final secret counsel to Zedekiah to surrender to Babylon.

outline.text: Princes Cast Jeremiah into Miry Dungeon of Malchiah
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Princes Cast Jeremiah into Miry Dungeon of Malchiah (38:1-6), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

outline.text: Ebed-melech the Ethiopian Rescues Jeremiah from Death
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Ebed-melech the Ethiopian Rescues Jeremiah from Death (38:7-13), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

outline.text: Final Secret Consult; Surrender Urged for Preservation
outline.explanation: This section focuses on Final Secret Consult; Surrender Urged for Preservation (38:14-28), highlighting its theological significance and showing how it develops the central message of Jeremiah.

key_themes.title: Prophecy of Conflict and Exile
key_themes.description: This chapter explores key facets of prophecy of conflict and exile, revealing how God's holy character directs both judgment and redemption.

key_themes.title: The Weeping Prophet
key_themes.description: Jeremiah's deep emotional connection to the message and the people, illustrating the heart of God breaking for His children's rebellion.

devotional.question: Reflecting on the warnings and historical accounts of Chapter 38, in what ways does Jeremiah's call to faithfulness encourage you in your own walk today?
How does this chapter prompt you to choose covenant obedience and trust in God's promises of restoration over temporary security?

cultural_historical.title: The Fall of Jerusalem and the Exile
cultural_historical.text: The historical backdrop of Jeremiah's ministry, witnessing the gradual collapse of Judah under the Babylonian Empire and the destruction of the Temple.
